author: flex-moto
description: Manage your bookshelf from ISBN. Fetches book metadata from NDL, Google Books, and Open Library, then creates and organizes book notes. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: flex-moto
manifest.description: Manage your bookshelf from ISBN. Fetches book metadata from NDL, Google Books, and Open Library, then creates and organizes book notes.
manifest.name: ISBN Bulk Import Bookshelf Builder

name: ISBN Bulk Import Bookshelf Builder

releases.author: flex-moto
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* [codex] Record original author approval by @flex-moto in https://github.com/flex-moto/easy-obookshelf/pull/6
* [codex] Add built plugin entrypoint by @takuyamotomura-2026 in https://github.com/flex-moto/easy-obookshelf/pull/7
* [codex] Fix Obsidian review findings by @flex-moto in https://github.com/flex-moto/easy-obookshelf/pull/8

## New Contributors
* @takuyamotomura-2026 made their first contribution in https://github.com/flex-moto/easy-obookshelf/pull/7

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/flex-moto/easy-obookshelf/compare/0.0.3...0.0.4

releases.author: flex-moto
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* [codex] ISBN一括登録と本棚表示を追加 by @flex-moto in https://github.com/flex-moto/easy-obookshelf/pull/1
* [codex] READMEに本棚作成例を追加し0.0.2へ更新 by @flex-moto in https://github.com/flex-moto/easy-obookshelf/pull/2
* 書誌情報・概要の再取得対応とv0.0.3への更新 by @flex-moto in https://github.com/flex-moto/easy-obookshelf/pull/3
* Kindle Highlightsノートへの概要一括追加 by @flex-moto in https://github.com/flex-moto/easy-obookshelf/pull/4
* [codex] Document Obsidian submission disclosures and fork attribution by @flex-moto in https://github.com/flex-moto/easy-obookshelf/pull/5

## New Contributors
* @flex-moto made their first contribution in https://github.com/flex-moto/easy-obookshelf/pull/1

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/flex-moto/easy-obookshelf/commits/0.0.3
